scripts.android:bundle:oldcreate: npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && rm -rf ./android/app/src/main/res/drawable-* && rm -rf ./android/app/src/main/res/raw
scripts.android:bundle:create: npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && rm -rf ./android/app/src/main/res/raw
scripts.android:gradle:clean: cd android && rm -rf app/.cxx && ./gradlew clean && cd ..
scripts.android:assemble:debug: npm run android:bundle:create && npm run android:gradle:clean && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:assemble:dev: npm run android:bundle:create && npm run android:gradle:clean && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDev
scripts.android:assemble:stg: npm run android:bundle:create && npm run android:gradle:clean && cd android && ./gradlew assembleStg
scripts.android:assemble:prd: npm run android:bundle:create && npm run android:gradle:clean && cd android && ./gradlew assemblePrd
scripts.android:bundle:stg: npm run android:bundle:create && npm run android:gradle:clean && cd android && ./gradlew bundleStg
scripts.android:bundle:prd: npm run android:bundle:create && npm run android:gradle:clean && cd android && ./gradlew bundlePrd
scripts.android:bundle:create:win: npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && rmdir /s /q android\app\src\main\res\drawable-* && rmdir /s /q android\app\src\main\res\raw
scripts.android:assemble:debug:win: npm run android:bundle:create:win && npm run android:gradle:clean:win && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:assemble:dev:win: npm run android:bundle:create:win && npm run android:gradle:clean:win && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDev
scripts.android:assemble:stg:win: npm run android:bundle:create:win && npm run android:gradle:clean:win && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleStg
scripts.android:assemble:prd:win: npm run android:bundle:create:win && npm run android:gradle:clean:win && cd android && gradlew.bat assemblePrd
scripts.android:bundle:stg:win: npm run android:bundle:create:win && npm run android:gradle:clea:win && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleStg
scripts.android:bundle:prd:win: npm run android:bundle:create:win && npm run android:gradle:clean:win && cd android && gradlew.bat bundlePrd
